items.title: Current Mortgage Rates: February 16 to February 20, 2026
items.description: Mortgage rates are trending lower, although they remain slightly above 6%. Rates are expected to remain in their current range for the time being.

items.title: Social Security Trust Fund to Run Out of Money in 2032, a Year Sooner Than Expected
items.description: If Social Security’s trust funds were fully depleted, the result would be a roughly 20% across-the-board cut in benefits.

items.title: What Your Checking Account Is Telling You (That You May Be Ignoring)
items.description: Check for a lack of a cash buffer, unnecessary fees and more.

items.title: ‘I Can’t Believe How Upset This Made Me’: I Earned $175K, and My Social Security Tax Stopped. Why Don’t High Earners Pay More?
items.description: The payroll tax cap exists, in part, because Social Security benefits only go up to a certain level.
